Gaming

GameConf Tokyo

Play the next decade.

November 10, 2026 – November 12, 2026Tokyo Big Sight, Tokyo22,000 attendees4.9

About this event

Join 22,000+ professionals at Tokyo Big Sight for GameConf Tokyo. Three days of keynotes, workshops and networking with the brightest minds in gaming.

GamingEsports

Participate in Event

As Visitor

Gain access to all keynotes, breakout sessions, and networking lounges.

As Delegate

VIP access, executive lounges, and priority seating for high-level summits.

As Exhibitor

Secure premium stall locations, showcase products, and scan high-intent leads.

As Speaker

Submit your session proposals and share your expertise with a global audience.
